items.title: [正面] This is the best gacha I've ever played hands down...
items.summary:
This is the best gacha I've ever played hands down. If you like gothic lovecraftian horror this was made for you. The character designs are incredible, and the gameplay is refreshing, being complex in strategy, but the core mechanics are simple to understand after a little practice. Fairly f2p friendly, the standard units are good and you are given many standard pulls for free. Bear in mind that characters are somewhat reliant on signature Wheels of Destiny (weapons) and dupes. There is an endgame mode that requires 5 teams, meaning there is incentive to build many characters and not just a core team that will nuke everything. I've had a blast so far.

Only con for me is the translation is AI, meaning it's not super accurate, but you'll figure out what everything means fairly easily. Despite that, the story is incredible.

items.title: [正面] If you like lovecraftian horror then this is the g...
items.summary: If you like lovecraftian horror then this is the game for you! The gacha is pretty generous too. Gameplay-wise is also fun. It's slay the spire basically (more so than reverse 1999).
